name: MeshClash
summary: Represents a particular instance of a clash or intersection between two meshes.

methods.name: FindDetail(RhinoObject, RhinoObject, Double)
methods.signature: public static Mesh[] FindDetail(RhinoObject objA, RhinoObject objB, double distance)
methods.summary: Finds all of the mesh faces on each of two Rhino objects that interfere within a clash distance. This function uses the object's mesh to calculate the interferences. Acceptable object types include: BrepObject, ExtrusionObject, MeshObject, and SubDObject.

params.name: objA
params.doc: The first Rhino object.

params.name: objB
params.doc: The second Rhino object.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which a clash can occur.

returns.doc: The resulting meshes are sub-meshes of the input meshes if successful, or an empty array on error.

methods.name: FindDetail(RhinoObject, RhinoObject, Double, MeshType, MeshingParameters)
methods.signature: public static Mesh[] FindDetail(RhinoObject objA, RhinoObject objB, double distance, MeshType meshType, MeshingParameters meshingParameters)
methods.summary: Finds all of the mesh faces on each of two Rhino objects that interfere within a clash distance. This function uses the object's mesh to calculate the interferences. Acceptable object types include: BrepObject, ExtrusionObject, MeshObject, and SubDObject.

params.name: objA
params.doc: The first Rhino object.

params.name: objB
params.doc: The second Rhino object.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which a clash can occur.

params.name: meshType
params.doc: The type of mesh to be used for the calculation.

params.name: meshingParameters
params.doc: The meshing parameters used to generate meshes for the calculation.

returns.doc: The resulting meshes are sub-meshes of the input meshes if successful, or an empty array on error.

methods.name: Search(IEnumerable<RhinoObject>, IEnumerable<RhinoObject>, Double)
methods.signature: public static MeshInterference[] Search(IEnumerable<RhinoObject> setA, IEnumerable<RhinoObject> setB, double distance)
methods.summary: Searches for locations where the distance from a RhinoObject, in one set of objects, is less than the specified distance to another RhinoObject in a second set of objects. This function uses the object's mesh to calculate the interferences. Acceptable object types include: BrepObject, ExtrusionObject, MeshObject, and SubDObject.

params.name: setA
params.doc: The first set of Rhino objects.

params.name: setB
params.doc: The second set of Rhino objects.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which a clash can occur.

returns.doc: An array of mesh interference object if successful, or an empty array on failure.

methods.name: Search(IEnumerable<Mesh>, IEnumerable<Mesh>, Double, Int32)
methods.signature: public static MeshClash[] Search(IEnumerable<Mesh> setA, IEnumerable<Mesh> setB, double distance, int maxEventCount)
methods.summary: Searches for locations where the distance from a mesh in one set of meshes is less than distance to another mesh in a second set of meshes.

params.name: setA
params.doc: The first set of meshes.

params.name: setB
params.doc: The second set of meshes.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which there is a clash. All values smaller than this cause a clash as well.

params.name: maxEventCount
params.doc: The maximum number of clash objects.

methods.name: Search(Mesh, Mesh, Double, Int32)
methods.signature: public static MeshClash[] Search(Mesh meshA, Mesh meshB, double distance, int maxEventCount)
methods.summary: Searches the locations where the distance from the first mesh to the second mesh is less than the provided value.

params.name: meshA
params.doc: The first mesh.

params.name: meshB
params.doc: The second mesh.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which there is a clash. All values smaller than this cause a clash as well.

params.name: maxEventCount
params.doc: The maximum number of clash objects.

methods.name: Search(Mesh, IEnumerable<Mesh>, Double, Int32)
methods.signature: public static MeshClash[] Search(Mesh meshA, IEnumerable<Mesh> setB, double distance, int maxEventCount)
methods.summary: Searches the locations where the distance from the first mesh to a mesh in the second set of meshes is less than the provided value.

params.name: meshA
params.doc: The first mesh.

params.name: setB
params.doc: The second set of meshes.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which there is a clash. All values smaller than this cause a clash as well.

params.name: maxEventCount
params.doc: The maximum number of clash objects.

methods.name: Search(IEnumerable<RhinoObject>, IEnumerable<RhinoObject>, Double, MeshType, MeshingParameters)
methods.signature: public static MeshInterference[] Search(IEnumerable<RhinoObject> setA, IEnumerable<RhinoObject> setB, double distance, MeshType meshType, MeshingParameters meshingParameters)
methods.summary: Searches for locations where the distance from a RhinoObject, in one set of objects, is less than the specified distance to another RhinoObject in a second set of objects. This function uses the object's mesh to calculate the interferences. Acceptable object types include: BrepObject, ExtrusionObject, MeshObject, and SubDObject.

params.name: setA
params.doc: The first set of Rhino objects.

params.name: setB
params.doc: The second set of Rhino objects.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The largest distance at which a clash can occur.

params.name: meshType
params.doc: The type of mesh to be used for the calculation.

params.name: meshingParameters
params.doc: The meshing parameters used to generate meshes for the calculation.

returns.doc: An array of mesh interference object if successful, or an empty array on failure.

properties.name: ClashPoint
properties.summary: If valid, then the sphere centered at ClashPoint of ClashRadius distance intersects the clashing meshes.

properties.name: ClashRadius
properties.summary: Gets the clash, or intersection, radius.
